items.title: Big-O Complexity
items.description: Big-O explains scaling; cProfile shows what actually dominates at your real input sizes — sometimes constant factors win.

items.title: Time-Space Tradeoffs
items.description: cProfile + memory profiling together let you pick the right space-time tradeoff with evidence.

items.title: Memory Profiling
items.description: cProfile finds CPU bottlenecks; tracemalloc/memray find memory bottlenecks. Most perf work needs both.

items.title: Logging for Debugging
items.description: Logs of `latency_ms` on hot paths can guide which functions to deep-profile with cProfile.

items.title: Integration Tests
items.description: Integration tests provide reproducible workloads to profile; pair with cProfile for end-to-end perf analysis.
